message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam note {
  BackgroundColor #FFFFCC
  BorderColor #000000
}
skinparam actor {
  BackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  BorderColor #000000
}
skinparam database {
  BackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  BorderColor #000000
}

title IP Layer and IPv4 Interface Interaction

participant "tuple" as tuple <<database>>
participant "Upper layer" as upper <<actor>>
participant "IPv4 layer" as ipv4layer
participant "Routing table" as routing <<database>>
participant "IPv4 interface" as ipv4interface
participant "ARP" as arp <<database>>
participant "Lower layer" as lower <<actor>>

note over tuple: IPv4.dst=192.0.2.1
upper -> ipv4layer: IPdata
note right of ipv4layer: Allocate\nIPv4\nheader
ipv4layer -> routing: dst=192.0.2.1
routing --> ipv4layer
ipv4layer --> tuple
note over tuple: IPv4.oif=ifp1\nIPv4.gw=198.51.100.1
ipv4layer --> tuple
note over tuple: IPv4.src=198.51.100.2
ipv4layer -> ipv4interface
ipv4interface -> arp: gw=198.51.100.1
arp --> ipv4interface: mac=00:00:0e:00:00:01
ipv4interface --> tuple
note over tuple: Ether.dst = 00:00:0e:00:00:01
ipv4interface -> lower

@enduml
